case_title: SUSAN TARLTON VS. WING ON FUNG et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TARLTON, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT FUNG, WING ON FUNG, CONNIE SIU MUI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FUNG, WING ON FUNG, CONNIE SIU MUI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. DAN LEW INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CHINESE - CHINESE/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VAMTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARLTON, SUSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUNG, WING ON FUNG, CONNIE SIU MUI $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,630.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
